name: You're Caught... IN A WAR!?
description:
Oi! Don't black out on me now!

Species:

In this world, there are 2 kinds of creatures that exist: "C.A.T-units" and "Shredders". C.A.T-units are fierce fighters that have a variety of weapons. These can range from guns, missiles, flamethrowers, etc. Shredders are pure aerial beings, they use a single weapon: cutters. Cutters are a type of weapon that cut subatomically. They can cut through anything, which is why shredders typically have them spin at high speeds to "shred" through opponents.

Both of these creatures are special in one common ability. If they were to be destroyed, they enter a weird state of non-existence. In this state, they can reconstruct their next body as they see fit. Once having constructed their next body, they respawn.

Story:

In the beginning, there was only C.A.T-units. There was a chaotic peace; violence was everywhere but it was consistent, there was not single focused hate, just violence overall. C.A.T-units didn't fear death as they could respawn. With this lack of feeling for life, they yearned after the feeling of the hunt. Everyone was fighting everyone for that same thrill.

However, this peace wasn't fated to last. The Shredders appeared from the skies like rain, in swarms. They cut through C.A.T-units like an iron nail through paper. C.A.T-units, obviously, fought back against the invaders. They used distance to shoot them down before they could get close. But there was one simple flaw: Shredders could adapt.

The Shredders soon adapted to their strategy by maximizing their speed. This meant that long range distance attacks could be dodged and the distance could be cleared in seconds. This pushed the C.A.T-units into a corner as their strategy was countered. This eventually made factions.

Factions:

The Golden Strike

This faction is, quite literally, the speartip of the war against the aliens, as well as being a spear against those who attack it.

The Ravens

This faction is a group of well-kept mercenaries. They work in the shadows, doing swift executions. However, without pay, they are obligated to turn back on their wrongdoers.

The Evenbodied

The Evenbodied is a faction that has decided to take a defensive position, guarding those who can’t guard themselves. This also means they have to take to the offensive when defending.

The Purge

These C.A.T-units take the grounds of killing those who aren’t in the group, a purity. They are highly militaristic in their efforts, but this also leads to a high nationalism to brew in their group.

The Manufacts

This is a group of profit hungry C.A.T-units. They keep traditional values of collecting, but always with a price, they constrict their enemies in debt-rigged traps.

The Valor

This faction is built upon pride, seeing those around them as lesser, putting themselves on a pedestal. This means they lash out at anyone who dares take that away.

Tags

War, furry, male, plane, conflict, attack, black out, shredder, gun, missile, fight, combat, abilities, strong,
creator: Oscillo
